title: The Treasure of Easter Island
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo and his friends follow a secret map to mysterious Easter Island to rescue Thea and uncover an ancient treasure 🗿

q.en: Who is the narrator and publisher of The Rodent's Gazette in this story?
q.zh: 这个故事的叙述者兼《老鼠公报》的出版商是谁？

explain.en: The book opens with 'My name is Stilton, Geronimo Stilton, and I'm the publisher of The Rodent's Gazette.'
explain.zh: 书一开头就写道：“我叫斯蒂顿，杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿，是《老鼠公报》的出版商。”

q.en: Who sent the strange, stinky letter to Geronimo from Easter Island?
q.zh: 是谁从复活节岛给杰罗尼摩寄来那封奇怪又臭烘烘的信？

explain.en: Inside the stinky envelope was a letter from his sister THEA asking him to come find her.
explain.zh: 在那封臭信封里，是妹妹蒂娜写来的信，请他去救自己。

q.en: Why did Thea's letter smell so terrible?
q.zh: 蒂娜的信为什么那么臭？

options.en: She dipped it in guano (bird poop) to keep others from opening it
options.zh: 她把信泡在鸟粪里，好让别人不想拆开

options.en: It was written using smelly cheese
It came from a garbage dump
It was sprayed with strong perfume

explain.en: Thea wrote that she dipped the letter in guano (bird poop) so sneaky rodents would never want to open it.
explain.zh: 蒂娜写道，她把信泡在鸟粪里，这样爱偷看的老鼠就不想拆信了。

q.en: On Easter Island, what is an 'ahu'?
q.zh: 在复活节岛上，“ahu”指的是什么？

options.en: A stone platform used as a burial site
A wooden tablet with carved writing

explain.en: Geronimo's guidebook says ahu are stone platforms used as burial sites by the ancient inhabitants.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩的旅游指南说，ahu 是古代居民用作墓地的石头平台。

q.en: Which site has the biggest ahu with its fifteen protectors?
q.zh: 哪个地方有最大的 ahu 和守护它的十五尊雕像？

explain.en: Vaitea says Ahu Tongariki is the biggest ahu, and Geronimo counts fifteen moai standing there.
explain.zh: 瓦伊蒂亚说汤加里基石台是最大的 ahu，杰罗尼摩数出那里立着十五尊摩艾雕像。

q.en: Where are the 'Seven Young Explorers' — the seven moai that face the sea?
q.zh: “七位年轻探险家”（面朝大海的七尊摩艾）在哪里？

explain.en: Vaitea explains the seven moai facing the sea are at Ahu Akivi, representing seven young explorers from Polynesia.
explain.zh: 瓦伊蒂亚说面朝大海的七尊摩艾在阿卡维石台，代表来自波利尼西亚的七位年轻探险家。

q.en: Who piloted the airplane that carried the group to Easter Island?
q.zh: 是谁驾驶飞机把大家送到复活节岛的？

options.en: Wild Willie, an archaeologist and adventure mouse
options.zh: 野 Willie，考古学家兼冒险鼠

explain.en: Wild Willie was flying the midnight-blue plane; he is described as an archaeologist and a true adventure mouse.
explain.zh: 野 Willie 驾驶着深蓝色的飞机，他被描述成考古学家和真正的冒险鼠。

q.en: What was the real 'Treasure of Rapa Nui' that Thea found?
q.zh: 蒂娜找到的真正“拉帕努伊宝藏”是什么？

options.en: Seven ancient reed canoes used by the young explorers
options.zh: 年轻探险家用的七艘古代芦苇船

options.en: A chest full of gold coins

explain.en: Thea pointed to seven canoes woven from reeds — the ancient boats the seven explorers used to reach Easter Island.
explain.zh: 蒂娜指着七艘芦苇编成的船——那是七位探险家用来抵达复活节岛的古代小船。

q.en: What happened to the pirates' black ship, the Phantom of the Night?
q.zh: 海盗的黑船“夜之幽灵号”最后怎么了？

options.en: It sank under the heavy weight of the gold moai
options.zh: 它被纯金摩艾的重量压沉了

options.en: It flew up into the sky
It was captured by a helicopter

explain.en: The gold moai was so heavy that the overloaded pirate ship sank in the bay before it could fire on the heroes.
explain.zh: 纯金摩艾太重，海盗船超载后还没开炮就在海湾里沉没了。

q.en: What was the name written on the side of the pirates' ship?
q.zh: 海盗船侧面上写的名字是什么？

explain.en: The group saw the ship's name on its side: PHANTOM OF THE NIGHT, all in black including the sails.
explain.zh: 大家看到船侧写着的名字：夜之幽灵号，连船帆都是黑色的。
